mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.comcode.selectComCdList */ SELECT UPP_COM_CD uppComCd , COM_CD comCd , CD_NM cdNm , SORT_NO sortNo , CD_COMMENT cdComment , USE_YN useYn , FILTER_1 filter1, FILTER_2 filter2, FILTER_3 filter3, FILTER_4 filter4, FILTER_5 filter5 , FILTER_6 filter6, FILTER_7 filter7, FILTER_8 filter8, FILTER_9 filter9, FILTER_10 filter10 , FILTER_COMMENT filterComment FROM STB_B_CD_MNG WHERE UPP_COM_CD = #{uppComCd} ORDER BY SORT_NO

/* on.standard.system.comcode.selectHierarchyComCdList */
WITH RECURSIVE MATCHED_ROOTS AS ( SELECT COM_CD FROM SVI_COM_CODE_MNG_HIERARCHY WHERE UPP_COM_CD = 'ROOT' AND ( COM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR CD_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') ) ) , HIERARCHY_TARGETS AS ( SELECT COM_CD FROM MATCHED_ROOTS UNION ALL SELECT child.COM_CD FROM SVI_COM_CODE_MNG_HIERARCHY child INNER JOIN HIERARCHY_TARGETS parent ON child.UPP_COM_CD = parent.COM_CD )
SELECT CASE WHEN CCMH.UPP_COM_CD = 'ROOT' THEN NULL ELSE CCMH.UPP_COM_CD END AS uppComCd , CCMH.COM_CD AS comCd , CCMH.CD_NM AS cdNm , CONCAT(CCMH.CD_NM, ' (',CCMH.COM_CD,')') AS cdDesc , CONCAT( REPEAT('&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;', CCMH.LEVEL - 1), IF(CCMH.LEVEL > 1, '└ ', ''), CCMH.COM_CD ) AS levComCd , CONCAT( REPEAT('&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;&NBSP;', CCMH.LEVEL - 1), IF(CCMH.LEVEL > 1, '└ ', ''), CCMH.CD_NM ) AS levCdNm , CCMH.SORT_NO AS sortNo , CCMH.CD_COMMENT AS cdComment , CCMH.USE_YN AS useYn , CCMH.LEVEL AS level , CCMH.CD_PATH AS cdPath , CCMH.FILTER_1 AS filter1 , CCMH.FILTER_2 AS filter2 , CCMH.FILTER_3 AS filter3 , CCMH.FILTER_4 AS filter4 , CCMH.FILTER_5 AS filter5 , CCMH.FILTER_6 AS filter6 , CCMH.FILTER_7 AS filter7 , CCMH.FILTER_8 AS filter8 , CCMH.FILTER_9 AS filter9 , CCMH.FILTER_10 AS filter10 , CCMH.FILTER_COMMENT AS filterComment FROM SVI_COM_CODE_MNG_HIERARCHY CCMH
INNER JOIN HIERARCHY_TARGETS HT ON CCMH.COM_CD = HT.COM_CD
ORDER BY CCMH.SORT_PATH
